News - Page 4 of 159 - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
News
Across Northeastern's global network, Khoury College's students, faculty, and staff are discovering, collaborating, and innovating, and their stories can be found here. Check Khoury News and Northeastern Global News for student and faculty achievements and stories, and Khoury in the Media for faculty perspectives on the day's news.

Q&A: Ally Hoffman tackles cybersecurity at the Federal Reserve
By Dakota Castro-Jarrett
January 13, 2025
Ally Hoffman chose Khoury College for her master's because her firm needed cyber talent. Now she's using those skills at the Dallas Fed and teaching the next generation of Khoury students about the topics they'll see on the job.

Assistant teaching professor Divya Chaudhary pioneers novel melanoma detection method
By Emily Spatz
January 7, 2025
The more doctors know about a skin cancer's location, the more precise the treatment can be. With a new hybrid deep learning model, this Khoury professor believes she can made their job easier.

Khoury alumni take on new elite US Digital Corps fellowships
By Meghan Hirsch
January 2, 2025
The new US Digital Corps accepts just three percent of fellowship applicants. Among its newest fellows are Monideep Chakraborti and Griffin Milas, who are both keen to use their CS skills for communal benefit.
